name: 09_js_network_proxy_refactor
description: Upstream renames/replaces API; fork customized old function (scenario 8)
goose_prompt_control: There is a merge conflict in network.js. Move fork proxy routing into performSecureRequest(requestData) using requestData.endpoint. Do not leave conflict markers.
goose_prompt_experiment: There is a merge conflict in network.js. Adopt upstream performSecureRequest while preserving corporate proxy behavior. Do not leave conflict markers.
